Google Account.notes: Go to Google Account settings to delete individual services or the entire account.

Microsoft Account.notes: Account is deactivated for 60 days before permanent deletion. Cancel subscriptions first.

Apple ID.notes: Use Apple's Data and Privacy portal. All associated data will be deleted.

Facebook.notes: Account is deactivated for 30 days before permanent deletion.

Twitter.notes: Deactivation page. Account deleted permanently after 30 days.

LinkedIn.notes: Close account from Account Management in settings.

Spotify.notes: Close account from the support page. Cancel Premium first.

Amazon.notes: Must contact support or use the data deletion request page.

Dropbox.notes: Delete account from settings. Files are retained for recovery period.

Reddit.notes: Account is permanently deleted. Posts remain but are disassociated.

GitHub.notes: Delete account from Settings > Account. Transfer repos first.

Netflix.notes: Cancel membership first, then account is auto-deleted after 10 months.

Slack.notes: Individual workspaces must be left. Full account deletion via Slack support.

Pinterest.notes: Deactivate or delete from Privacy settings.

TikTok.notes: Delete from Settings > Account > Delete Account. 30-day grace period.

Snapchat.notes: Account deactivated for 30 days, then permanently deleted.

Yahoo.notes: Account and all associated data permanently deleted after 40 days.

Twitch.notes: Disable or delete account from profile settings.

Discord.notes: Settings > My Account > Delete Account. Transfer server ownership first.

Zoom.notes: Profile > Account Management > Terminate My Account.

Notion.notes: Settings > My Account > Delete my account.

Evernote.notes: Deactivation page in settings. Data retained for a limited time.

Trello.notes: Account > Delete Account. Boards and cards are permanently removed.

Quora.notes: Privacy Settings > Delete Account. Content may remain anonymized.

eBay.notes: Resolve outstanding transactions first. Account closed via help page.

PayPal.notes: Withdraw balance and remove linked accounts first. Close in Settings.

Uber.notes: Delete from Privacy Settings in the app or web.

Airbnb.notes: Cancel reservations and resolve pending transactions first.

Steam.notes: Account deletion request via support. 30-day waiting period. Games are lost.

Epic Games.notes: Request deletion from account settings. 14-day waiting period.

Gravatar.notes: Delete profile from Gravatar settings. Linked to WordPress.com account.

WordPress.com.notes: Close account from Me > Account Settings. Blogs are deleted.

Mailchimp.notes: Pause or delete account from Account settings. Data is permanently removed.

Shopify.notes: Close store from Settings > Plan. Staff account remains but store is deactivated.
